dj_text: Friends Opening Theme [Medieval Style Cover] is dead. Long live DaBaby, Roddy Ricch - Rockstar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover]. Or whatever.

recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: DaBaby, Roddy Ricch - Rockstar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover]
